slugs.concept: Two researchers compare patent drawings in a wooden archive, tracing prior art from a selected drawer to a defensible research handoff.
A developer and voice tester sort ambiguous utterance cards around a microphone, turning an edge case into a reviewed intent.
Designer and developer connect a hand-cut storefront facade to a physical data drawer, showing visual prototyping becoming a dynamic site.
In a misty greenhouse, a participant takes one manageable step along a stone path while a facilitator keeps the human support boundary visible.
An artist chooses among three handmade creature variants, making human curation the final step in an image-generation workflow.
At a windswept ferry terminal, a traveler and language mediator resolve a near-synonym by comparing blank phrase cards with a reference dictionary.
Editors pour colored data tiles into a movable-type tray and hold back one exaggerated tile during proofing of a recurring report.
On a sunlit train, an editor compares tone variants and hands a clearer human-approved draft to a colleague.
A recruiter sorts candidate folders into workflow trays while hiring managers review structured interview cards and one pending human decision.

visual_inspection: passed: all nine final WebP files visually inspected; distinct scenes, no readable text, logos, watermarks or fake UI
